title: Elfew 6 Pack Reusable Sticker Books for Kids Ages 2-4 Year Old, 3D Puffy Stickers for Children, Airplane Activities for Kids 4-8 Girls Boys Birthday Gifts
features: 6 Exciting Themes for Endless Fun: Our sticker book set includes 6 different themes(Space,Wild Animal,Vehicle,Ocean,Dinosaurs) each with a reusable sticker sheet, allowing kids to explore various scenes and stories, ideal for stimulating creativity and imagination in toddlers aged 2-4.

Reusable Stickers for Long-Lasting Play: The stickers are designed with reusable veneer adhesive, enabling children to stick and re-stick them multiple times without losing adhesion, ensuring hours of interactive and educational fun.

Handle Design for On the Go Play: Featuring a convenient handle easy to carry, making it an ideal travel companion for road trips, plane rides, which keep the child entertained and quiet, or parents together with their children to enhance the parent-child relationship.

As A Tool for Teaching and Learning: This DIY sticker activity book encourages children to use their fine motor skills and creativity as they place stickers on different scenes, helps children learn about animals and scene building.

Ideal Choice for Kids Ages 2-4: The sticker activity books will a ideal choice for home school, preschool or classroom.Also as a gift for young kids, providing parents with peace of mind while their kids enjoy creative play.
